fast.description: Maximum throughput. Best for simple summarization, queue triage, health checks, and many parallel agents.

balanced.description: Balanced local reasoning. Best default when tasks need more reasoning than kivi but still need speed.

coding.description: Coding-oriented local models. Best for code review, code generation suggestions, and implementation planning.

review.description: Review-heavy profile. Best for comparing code, finding issues, and generating risk notes.
